Q1 Not checked
General Aptitude • CIVIL ENGINEERING • Intermediate • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

What is the sum of the largest and the smallest 4-digit numbers made by using single digit prime numbers (without repetition)?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
Single digit prime numbers are 2, 3, 5, 7
Largest number formed is 7532
Smallest number formed 2357
Their sum will be 9889

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)

Statement II : A mail train takes 40 minutes less than an express train to cover the distance.

Correct answer: D

(d)

Solution

(a)
Being a heavy user of resources, if USA maintains status quo, it will help in retarding the pace of depletion of the resources.

Q31 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

In odd-parity scheme which of the words contain an error
1. 1 0 1 1 1 0 0 1
2. 1 1 1 1 0 1 1 0
3. 1 0 1 0 1 0 1 0

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
The number of 1’s in the word 1 0 1 1 1 0 0 1 is odd — No error
The number of 1’s in the word 1 1 1 1 0 1 1 0 is even — an error
The number of 1’s in the word 1 0 1 0 1 0 1 0 is even number — an error
